locator.title: Магия Магния
locator.lead: Зачем нужен магний, каким бывает и какой магний лучше

nearest_text_before.text: Магний традиционно считается «витамином от стресса», однако помимо успокаивающего и расслабляющего эффекта этот незаменимый макроэлемент взвалил на себя тысячу обязанностей: он участвует в создании ДНК, производстве белка, превращении еды в энергию, регуляции количества сахара в крови, контроле артериального давления, сокращении мышц, в том числе сердечных и выработке гормонов.

nearest_text_after.text: И это далеко не полный перечень его многочисленных функций!

image_reading: A tightly framed woman faces the camera with wide eyes, clenched teeth, and both hands held near her cheeks in a tense claw-like gesture.
Her face, eyelids, jaw, fingers, and shoulders can support small expressive movement; the plain indoor background should remain unobtrusive.
analysis.article_context: The body image illustrates the section on signs of magnesium deficiency. Positioned immediately after the symptom list and before the explanation that an eye twitch can be a distress signal, it emphasizes visible tension, irritability, and loss of composure rather than magnesium products or treatment.
analysis.base_scene: The close portrait begins with the woman already visibly tense, eyes wide and both hands raised beside her face. Her strain develops through a brief eyelid twitch and tightening fingers, then eases slightly into a controlled exhale while the underlying discomfort remains clear.

models.scene_plan: Over four seconds with a fixed camera, develop one continuous stress response: a subtle eyelid twitch begins, tension spreads through her jaw, shoulders, and curling fingers, then partially subsides with a short exhale. End near the final moment with her hands slightly loosened and shoulders marginally lower, while her expression remains uneasy.
models.positive_prompt: Fixed camera, single continuous shot. The woman’s lower eyelid begins to twitch subtly as her eyes stay wide; tension builds through her clenched jaw, raised shoulders, and fingers curling tighter beside her face. She then releases a short controlled breath, her fingers loosen slightly and her shoulders drop a little, ending still visibly strained.
